title: polyalthia elliptica
intro: Polyalthia elliptica, also known as the Elephant Ear tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Annonaceae. The plant is native to tropical regions and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Polyalthia elliptica include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory infections, as well as its use in treating digestive issues and skin conditions. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and bark are typically used to make infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
